title: A Strategic Debacle, But Stocks Keep Winning
title_cn: 战略失败，但股市继续上涨
summary: A lot is riding on whether inflation from the Iran war can stay manageable.

title: Stocks Hit Record on AI Rally, Oil Rises on Iran: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市因人工智能上涨而创历史新高，伊朗石油价格上涨：市场总结
summary: Stocks rose to a record as investors doubled down on the artificial intelligence trade that’s powered equities to all-time highs. Oil climbed as a US-Iran ceasefire deal remained elusive.

title: Copper Gains With US Tariffs Deadline Less Than a Month Away
title_cn: 距离美国关税截止日期还有不到一个月，铜价上涨
summary: Copper advanced in New York and London to kick off a crucial month that should deliver more clarity on the Trump administration’s plans for levies on imports of the metal to the US.

title: Aussie Risks More Losses Versus Kiwi on Rate View, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师表示，从利率观点来看，澳元比新西兰元面临更多损失
summary: The Australian dollar may have further scope to fall against the kiwi as traders unwind bearish positions in New Zealand’s currency following a hawkish shift from the nation’s central bank, analysts said.

title: LG Electronics Shares Jump Over 300% in 2026 on Physical AI Push
title_cn: 物理人工智能推动 LG 电子股价 2026 年上涨 300% 以上
summary: LG Electronics Inc. shares have quadrupled this year as investors applaud the venerable Korean appliance maker’s shift into robotics.

title: India Keeps Local Jet Fuel Prices Unchanged After Airline Plea
title_cn: 在航空公司恳求后，印度维持当地航空燃油价格不变
summary: India’s state-owned oil refiners have kept jet fuel prices steady for local flights following a plea from airlines to hold off on further hikes as they grapple with the fallout from the Iran war.

title: SMBC Nikko Mulls Launching $627 Million Japan Mezzanine Fund
title_cn: SMBC Nikko 考虑推出 6.27 亿美元的日本夹层基金
summary: SMBC Nikko Securities Inc. is considering establishing a fund with One Investment Management to provide so-called mezzanine financing, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Korea Boosts Bond-Market Vigil Via Daily Phone Calls, Group Chat
title_cn: 韩国通过每日电话、群聊促进债券市场守夜活动
summary: South Korea intensified monitoring of the government bond market through daily phone calls and a private messaging group with market participants, as authorities step up efforts to contain rising yields.

title: SpaceX’s IPO Forces Wall Street to Reorganize Around It
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股迫使华尔街围绕其进行重组
summary: The company’s ambitious listing plan is set to clear the way for other mega-offerings. It also risks threatening the integrity of the market itself

title: ECB’s Schnabel Sees Risk of Unanchored Inflation Views From War
title_cn: 欧洲央行施纳贝尔认为战争导致通胀失控的风险
summary: The European Central Bank can no longer look through the inflationary impact of the war in Iran as price pressures spread beyond energy and the risk of unanchored inflation expectations rises, according to Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel.

title: Yen Defies Record Intervention as Wait for BOJ Hike Raises Risks
title_cn: 等待日本央行加息增加风险，日元未能接受创纪录的干预
summary: Yen traders face a heightened risk of intervention over the next two weeks after Japan’s currency defied historic attempts to prop it up.

title: Ryan Is Said to Agree to Buy Nordic Tax Adviser Svalner Atlas
title_cn: 据说 Ryan 同意收购北欧税务顾问 Svalner Atlas
summary: Ryan LLC, backed by Neuberger and Onex Corp., has agreed to acquire European tax adviser Svalner Atlas Advisors, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Oil Rises From Six-Week Low Amid Uncertainty Over US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 由于美伊协议的不确定性，油价从六周低点上涨
summary: Oil rose from a six-week low amid uncertainty over the outlook for a peace deal to end the war in Iran.

title: Goldman Sees Two-Sided Risk to Oil as Lower Use Offsets Iran War
title_cn: 高盛认为石油使用量下降抵消了伊朗战争的影响，存在双面风险
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. sees two-sided risks to oil prices as a slump in demand competes with supply losses from the Middle East because of the Iran war.

title: India Rate Risks, Fiscal Worries Add to Pressure on Bond Yields
title_cn: 印度利率风险和财政担忧加剧债券收益率压力
summary: The recent surge in Indian bond yields may extend as investors weigh prospects of interest-rate hikes, while concerns grow over the government’s fiscal position.

title: Key Takeaways From the Shangri-La Dialogue Forum
title_cn: 香格里拉对话论坛的主要收获
summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth praised defense allies in Asia and hailed newly stable ties with China at an Asia security forum in Singapore. Key US allies in the region also spoke about the security impact of geopolitical tensions both in Asia-Pacific and the Middle East. Bloomberg's China Correspondent Minmin Low breaks down the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Investors Turn Sellers of Hong Kong Stocks in Rare Reversal
title_cn: 中国投资者罕见逆转抛售港股
summary: Chinese mainland investors turned net sellers of Hong Kong stocks for the first time in nearly three years in May, after a surge in tech shares trading onshore eroded the appeal of the city’s market.

title: Vietnam’s Gene Solutions Eyes Hong Kong IPO to Fund Expansion
title_cn: 越南基因解决方案公司考虑在香港首次公开募股，为扩张提供资金
summary: Vietnamese diagnostic testing startup Gene Solutions is preparing for a Hong Kong initial public offering as early as the second quarter of next year, a rare local firm seeking to access deeper capital markets and boost international visibility.

title: TSMC’s Local Investors Narrow Valuation Gap With Wall Street
title_cn: 台积电本地投资者缩小与华尔街的估值差距
summary: Local investors are driving the premium on Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s US-listed shares to a two-year low as they pile into the chipmaker’s stock in Taipei on bets the AI boom has further to run.

title: China’s Shoppers Are Buying Luxury Again as Stock Market Rebounds
title_cn: 随着股市反弹，中国消费者再次购买奢侈品
summary: Chinese consumers are showing signs of a renewed appetite for high-end beauty and fashion products, a rare bright spot for global luxury brands after years of weak demand and margin-eroding discounts in their most important growth market.

title: Wall Street Risk Rally Powers Past War Stalemate
title_cn: 华尔街风险反弹推动战争僵局过去
summary: Three months into the Iran war, it has become all but impossible to damp the bullish spirit driving global markets for risky assets.

title: Billionaire Hotelier Wants to Take Japan’s APA Global
title_cn: 亿万富翁酒店经营者希望将日本的 APA 推向全球
summary: The family-run APA hotel chain that turned efficiency into a hospitality empire is betting it can export its uniquely Japanese formula abroad, starting with North America. APA Group CEO Isshi Motoya spoke with Bloomberg News' Momoka Yokoyama in Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Trader Bets on Fed Hike Poised for Gut Check From Jobs Data
title_cn: 债券交易员押注美联储加息，准备从就业数据中进行深入检查
summary: Bond traders are looking to a key jobs report this week to confirm their wagers that the US economy is strong enough to push the Federal Reserve to lift interest rates by next year.

title: IMF Chief, Venezuelan Officials Hold Talks on Economy Issues
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织总裁与委内瑞拉官员就经济问题举行会谈
summary: International Monetary Fund Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva and Venezuelan economic official Calixto Ortega held talks in Washington, the IMF head’s first in-person meeting with country’s authorities since the fund resumed formal engagement with Venezuela last month.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/31/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 5 月 31 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by New York Times Chief Africa Correspondent Declan Walsh, Harvard Kennedy School Center for Public Leadership Research Fellow Gautam Mukunda, Can’t Look Away Director Matthew O’Neill and Fmr. National Security Advisor & Fmr. US Ambassador to the UN Amb. John Bolton. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Enters Windows Laptop Market, Taking On Intel and AMD
title_cn: Nvidia 进军 Windows 笔记本电脑市场，挑战英特尔和 AMD
summary: Nvidia Corp. is entering the PC market with a new chip aimed at loosening the stranglehold of Intel Corp. technology in that arena and modernizing the machines for the AI era.

title: Nvidia Says Anthropic, OpenAI Among Big Users of New Vera Chip
title_cn: Nvidia 称 Anthropic、OpenAI 是新型 Vera 芯片的大用户
summary: Nvidia Corp. said Anthropic PBC, OpenAI and SpaceX are among the first big users of its upcoming microprocessor, securing key customers for its latest attempt to expand an already extensive footprint in AI data centers.

title: AI Savings Misses ‘Should Be Making Executives Uncomfortable,’ Bain Says
title_cn: 贝恩表示，人工智能节省的失误“应该让高管们感到不舒服”
summary: Cost savings from automation are broadly falling short of projections, according to a new Bain & Co. global survey of large companies.

title: Why Africa’s Population Boom Could Power Its Next Growth Era
title_cn: 为什么非洲人口激增可以推动其下一个增长时代
summary: Could Africa’s long-misunderstood population boom become its greatest economic advantage? Economist and author Joe Studwell joins host Merryn Somerset Webb to discuss his book, How Africa Works: Success and Failure on the World's Last Developmental Frontier. He argues that rising population density is already transforming the continent by creating deeper markets, boosting agricultural productivity, supporting urbanization and making manufacturing more viable. While governance, debt and commodity dependence remain risks, he sees a more diverse, locally driven growth story emerging across Africa. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: アップルが次に狙うは眼鏡市場、スマートグラスで既存業界を切り崩せるか－Power On
title_cn: 苹果的下一个目标是眼镜市场，它能否用智能眼镜颠覆现有行业？ - 开机
summary: Apple Watchで腕時計業界を塗り替えたアップルが、スマートフォン市場に匹敵する巨大な眼鏡市場の開拓に取り組んでいる

title: Deloitte APAC CEO on AI Impact on Businesses
title_cn: 德勤亚太区首席执行官谈人工智能对企业的影响
summary: Rob Hillard, APAC CEO at Deloitte, discusses the impact of AI on corporates across the region. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ten Cap's Liu on Markets, Investment Strategy
title_cn: Ten Cap 的刘谈市场、投资策略
summary: Jun Bei Liu, Co-founder and Lead Portfolio Manager at Ten Cap, discusses her outlook for markets and investment strategy. She speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gen-Z Gamer’s 3D-Model Startup Becomes China’s Latest AI Unicorn
title_cn: Z世代玩家的3D模型初创公司成为中国最新的人工智能独角兽
summary: Vast, a 3D-modeling startup founded by a 29-year-old gamer, raised nearly $200 million to become the latest Chinese AI outfit to achieve a valuation of $1 billion.

title: Backrooms, Obsession Usher in the Era of the YouTube Filmmaker
title_cn: 幕后，痴迷迎来 YouTube 电影制作人的时代
summary: Low-budget horror movies directed by YouTube creators are proving more popular than Star Wars

title: Dell Rivals Apple’s MacBook Neo With $699 Touch-Screen XPS 13 Laptop
title_cn: 戴尔推出触摸屏 XPS 13 笔记本电脑，售价 699 美元，与苹果 MacBook Neo 竞争
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. introduced a redesigned XPS 13 laptop, positioning the device as a direct answer to Apple Inc.’s popular MacBook Neo, which stunned the budget PC market upon its debut in March with its features and price.

title: Major Companies Reconsider AI Costs
title_cn: 大公司重新考虑人工智能成本
summary: Chipmakers are by far the hottest stocks in the market, but their recent surge is lending urgency to the debate over whether investors are buying into an artificial-intelligence bubble that could be due to burst. Harvard Kennedy School’s Center for Public Leadership Research Fellow Gautam Mukunda joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indian Exam Board Admits to Cybersecurity Holes Found by Teen
title_cn: 印度考试委员会承认青少年发现网络安全漏洞
summary: A national school exam board in India said it has been monitoring and has contained vulnerabilities in its online grading portal for one of the country’s most important school-leaving exams that were first flagged by a teenage cybersecurity researcher.

title: Apple Seeks to Disrupt the Glasses Market the Way It Did With Watches
title_cn: 苹果寻求像手表一样颠覆眼镜市场
summary: Also: The latest on iOS 27, iOS 28, new Apple TV and HomePod mini.

title: Big Tech Is Suddenly Impacting Niche Market for US Dividends
title_cn: 大型科技公司突然影响美国股息的利基市场
summary: The dominance of a few technology giants in the benchmark S&P 500 Index is now carrying over into the niche market for dividend futures and options.

title: How a Nigerian Startup Became an Fintech Unicorn
title_cn: 尼日利亚初创公司如何成为金融科技独角兽
summary: African fintech unicorn Moniepoint was founded in 2015 and has grown into one of the continent's standout success stories. From powering payments for small businesses to building critical financial infrastructure, the company has scaled rapidly and earned its place among Africa's most valuable tech firms. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja spoke to Felix Ike, the company's co-founder and CTO, about Moniepoint's journey from startup to unicorn, and what it takes to build at scale in Africa's fast-evolving tech landscape.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX, OpenAI Windfall Fuels Bets on Next-Wave Asian AI Winners
title_cn: SpaceX 和 OpenAI 意外之财推动了对下一波亚洲人工智能获胜者的押注
summary: The hunt is on for companies that could benefit from the tailwinds of an unprecedented wave of stock offerings in the US, and investors are increasingly honing in on the Asian supply chain.

title: SoftBank Plans Up to €75 Billion Investment in French AI Centers
title_cn: 软银计划向法国人工智能中心投资高达 750 亿欧元
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to invest as much as €75 billion ($87 billion) to build 5 gigawatts of artificial intelligence data center capacity in France, saying the country is poised to become a top European hub for AI infrastructure.

title: Legacy Tech Stocks Surge on AI Pivot
title_cn: 传统科技股因人工智能转向而飙升
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence Global Head of Technology Research Mandeep Singh joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss so-called "legacy" tech companies like Dell, Intel and Nokia seeing their stocks surge as they turn to AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed’s Williams Quips Economist Jobs Are Safe as AI Shift Unfolds
title_cn: 美联储威廉姆斯打趣称，随着人工智能转变的展开，经济学家的工作岗位是安全的
summary: The implications of artificial intelligence gripped global central bankers in Iceland this week, with one Federal Reserve official joking that it won’t put economists out of business.

title: Tech Stars From the 90s Reborn: Nokia, Dell, Cisco Surge on AI
title_cn: 90 年代科技明星重生：诺基亚、戴尔、思科在人工智能领域崛起
summary: They were all stars of the dot-com era before fading into the background as the bubble burst and a new generation of tech darlings rose to the forefront. But Dell Technologies Inc., Nokia Oyj and Lenovo Group Ltd. are back with a vengeance thanks to the unrelenting artificial intelligence spending boom.

title: AI Dangers Eclipse Nuclear Weapons at Singapore Defense Forum
title_cn: 新加坡防务论坛上人工智能的危险使核武器黯然失色
summary: The dangers of AI eclipsed those of nuclear weapons at a defense forum discussion on strategic stability in Singapore, as panelists warned it could reduce reaction times to the point where people make rash decisions.

title: Anthropic Cuts Unauthorized Platform List by Half After Pushback
title_cn: Anthropic 在抵制后将未经授权的平台列表削减了一半
summary: Anthropic PBC updated its warning about secondary markets for its shares, cutting the number of unauthorized platforms by half, after the notice caused panic among investors and a sharp rebuttal from one of the companies named.

title: MiniMax Eyes China Listing, Takes on AI Rivals Like DeepSeek
title_cn: MiniMax 着眼于中国上市，与 DeepSeek 等人工智能竞争对手展开较量
summary: China’s MiniMax Group Inc. has begun preparations for a domestic listing, according to a regulatory filing, as the fast‑growing artificial intelligence startup challenges local rivals including DeepSeek.

title: Danish Pension Blacklists SpaceX Over ‘Catastrophic Governance’
title_cn: 丹麦养老金因“灾难性治理”将 SpaceX 列入黑名单
summary: A $25 billion Danish pension fund that earlier this year made headlines by ditching Treasuries as Donald Trump was threatening to seize Greenland now says it won’t touch SpaceX.

title: 25 African Startups to Watch | Bloomberg Next Africa
title_cn: 25 家值得关注的非洲初创公司 |彭博下一个非洲
summary: On this edition of Next Africa, we bring you Bloomberg's 2026 African startups to watch list. From Egypt to Mauritius, these companies are racing to solve some of the continent's toughest challenges. Plus, we hear from Moniepoint co-founder and CTO, Felix Ike, on building one of Africa's leading fintech platforms. We also speak with venture capital investors on opportunities and challenges of investing in the continent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Sends Patrol East of Taiwan After Tokyo-Manila Talks
title_cn: 东京-马尼拉会谈后中国向台湾东部派遣巡逻队
summary: China said it sent Coast Guard vessels on “law enforcement patrols” to the east of Taiwan, a show of displeasure after Japan and the Philippines agreed to hold talks on maritime borders in the area.

title: Sheinbaum Accuses US of Interfering in Mexico’s Politics
title_cn: 希因鲍姆指责美国干涉墨西哥政治
summary: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum launched her strongest criticism to date against what she says are blunt US attempts to interfere in Mexican domestic politics.

title: Abiy Eyes New Term as Ethiopia Faces Economic Strain, Insecurity
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚面临经济紧张和不安全局势，阿比着眼新任期
summary: Ethiopian Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed looks set to secure another five-year term in Monday’s elections, extending a tenure that was initially marked by sweeping reforms and later marred by civil conflict and rising regional tensions.

title: Taiwan No. 2 to Visit Palau, Countering China’s Isolation Bid
title_cn: 台湾第二号将访问帕劳，对抗中国的孤立举动
summary: Taiwanese Vice President Hsiao Bi-khim is making her first overseas trip to a diplomatic ally as the democracy’s No. 2 official, countering China’s isolation campaign.

title: US, Iran Trade Deal Drafts as Israel Expands Lebanon Assault
title_cn: 以色列扩大对黎巴嫩的袭击，美国与伊朗草拟贸易协议
summary: The US and Iran traded messages over the weekend seeking changes to a draft agreement that would extend a ceasefire and open the Strait of Hormuz, but it was unclear whether the sides were making much progress.

title: Vietnam, Philippines Elevate Ties as They Navigate China Tension
title_cn: 越南与菲律宾提升关系以应对中国紧张局势
summary: Vietnam and the Philippines bolstered their bilateral relations as Vietnamese President To Lam wraps up a Southeast Asia tour aimed at shoring up regional security alliances.

title: India’s Modi Hosts Sanctioned Myanmar Leader to Build Relations
title_cn: 印度莫迪接待受制裁的缅甸领导人以建立关系
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi is hosting Myanmar President Min Aung Hlaing’s first foreign trip since the former junta chief became president following a widely-criticized election.

title: Pro-Trump Outsider Wins Colombia Vote, Setting Up Heated Runoff
title_cn: 支持特朗普的局外人赢得哥伦比亚投票，掀起激烈决选
summary: Celebrity lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella unexpectedly topped the first round of Colombia’s presidential vote, as Latin America heads into another highly polarized election.

title: Australia Populist Party Surges to Poll Lead as Budget Struggles
title_cn: 预算困难，澳大利亚民粹党在民意调查中大幅领先
summary: Australia’s populist One Nation party surged past the ruling Labor party to lead a nationwide opinion poll for the first time, highlighting voter disappointment with last month’s budget and reinforcing signs of a fracturing of the conservative side of politics.

title: Powell Says Fed Credibility Lost If President Can Fire Officials
title_cn: 鲍威尔表示，如果总统可以解雇官员，美联储的信誉就会丧失
summary: Former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell said the US central bank would lose the credibility that’s required to support a strong and stable economy if any president were free to dismiss Fed officials over policy disagreements.

title: US, Iran Trade Drafts of Deal
title_cn: 美国与伊朗贸易协议草案
summary: The US and Iran traded messages over the weekend seeking changes to a draft agreement that would extend a ceasefire and open the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Wendy Benjaminson has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hegseth Seeks to Convince Allies Silence Is Best on Taiwan
title_cn: 赫格斯试图说服盟友对台湾保持沉默是最好的
summary: At a security forum in Singapore, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth sought to convince US allies that staying quiet on Taiwan is the best way to project American strength. While time will tell if that’s the case, for the moment it’s a win for Chinese President Xi Jinping.

title: Burnham Opens Door to UK General Election If He Becomes Premier
title_cn: 如果伯纳姆成为首相，他将为英国大选敞开大门
summary: Andy Burnham, the Greater Manchester mayor who wants to replace Keir Starmer as UK prime minister this summer, has left open the possibility that he could call an early general election if he wins power.

title: Starmer Braces for Release of Hundreds of Mandelson Messages
title_cn: 斯塔默准备发布数百条曼德尔森信息
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will be forced to publish hundreds of private exchanges between disgraced former ambassador Peter Mandelson and members of his government on Monday, disclosures which are likely to put his beleaguered premiership in further danger.

title: Hungary Set for Power Clash as President Rejects Demand to Quit
title_cn: 匈牙利总统拒绝退出要求，将引发权力冲突
summary: Hungarian President Tamas Sulyok rejected Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s demand that he resign, setting up a political showdown between the country’s old and new leadership figures.

title: Vote Count Starts in Colombia’s High-Stakes Election
title_cn: 哥伦比亚高风险选举开始计票
summary: The vote count is underway in Colombia’s presidential election in which the economic model, counter-narcotics policies and relations with Washington are all at stake.

title: Newark Imposes Curfew at Migrant Detention Site as Visits Resume
title_cn: 纽瓦克在移民拘留所恢复探访时实施宵禁
summary: An immigrant detention center in New Jersey that has sparked violent protests will resume visits for detainees, Governor Mikie Sherrill said, after a night of confrontations that prompted Newark’s mayor to impose a curfew.

title: Israel Expands Lebanon Assault With Iran-US Talks in Balance
title_cn: 伊朗与美国谈判取得平衡，以色列扩大对黎巴嫩的袭击
summary: Israel expanded its ground assault in Lebanon with its broadest incursion into the country in a quarter-century as Hezbollah — Iran’s most powerful regional ally — stepped up attacks on Israel’s north.

title: Peru’s Fujimori Holds Narrow Lead Over Sánchez Ahead of Runoff
title_cn: 秘鲁选手藤森在决赛中以微弱优势领先桑切斯
summary: Peru’s conservative candidate Keiko Fujimori holds a three percentage point lead over her leftist contender ahead of next Sunday’s runoff, according to a poll, in what is expected to be a close race for the presidency of one of Latin America’s most stable economies.

title: Paxton to Meet Thune, GOP Senate Leaders in Washington This Week
title_cn: 帕克斯顿本周将在华盛顿会见共和党参议院领导人图恩
summary: Ken Paxton, the Texas Republican Senate nominee, will visit Senate GOP leaders in Washington to ease their concerns about his viability in the most populous red state in the US.

title: Ex-VP Pence Calls Trump’s $1.8 Billion Fund ‘Deeply Offensive’
title_cn: 前副总统彭斯称特朗普 18 亿美元的基金“极具攻击性”
summary: Former Vice President Mike Pence said it’s “deeply offensive” that a new $1.8 billion settlement fund created by the Trump administration to resolve the president’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service could be used to pay participants of the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot.

title: Trump Adds Iraq to Special Envoy Tom Barrack’s Role in Syria
title_cn: 特朗普将伊拉克纳入特使汤姆·巴拉克在叙利亚的角色中
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s expanding the scope of his special envoy to Syria, Tom Barrack, to include Iraq.

title: Malta’s Labour Party Wins Historic Fourth Term in Early Election
title_cn: 马耳他工党在提前选举中赢得历史性第四个任期
summary: Malta’s Labour Party won a historic fourth consecutive term in an early election called by the government as it sought a fresh mandate during a period of geopolitical uncertainty.

title: BC Conservatives Elect Findlay to Lead Opposition to Eby
title_cn: BC省保守党选举Findlay领导反对Eby
summary: The opposition Conservative Party of British Columbia elected Kerry-Lynne Findlay as their new leader as the party enjoys a swell in popularity against David Eby’s left-leaning New Democratic Party government.

title: IAEA Visits Atomic Plant After Strike, Kyiv Hits Russia Refinery
title_cn: 国际原子能机构视察袭击后的原子能工厂，基辅袭击俄罗斯炼油厂
summary: Experts from the International Atomic Energy Agency inspected damage to the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant on Sunday, a day after Russia claimed a Ukrainian drone had hit the idled atomic facility.

title: Trump Floats Rally After Musical Acts Abandon 250th Event
title_cn: 音乐表演取消第 250 届活动后特朗普举行集会
summary: President Donald Trump responded to a wave of cancellations by artists who were scheduled to perform in Washington for the US’s 250th birthday by proposing himself as a better alternative.

title: ‘Quiet’ Hegseth Plays Off Europe Against Asia: Balance of Power Special
title_cn: “安静”赫格斯在欧洲与亚洲之间较量：权力平衡特辑
summary: US allies everywhere are worried about the US staying too quiet in standing up against tyranny.

title: EU Weighs Temporary Freeze on Russia Oil Price Cap Over Iran
title_cn: 欧盟考虑暂时冻结俄罗斯石油价格上限以应对伊朗问题
summary: The European Union is considering a temporary freeze to its price cap on Russian oil as the war in the Middle East continues into a fourth month, said people familiar with the matter.

title: Nigeria’s Obi to Run for President in 2027, Splitting Opposition
title_cn: 尼日利亚奥比将于 2027 年竞选总统，反对派分裂
summary: Nigerian politician Peter Obi will run for president in the West African nation’s January elections, ensuring that the opposition to incumbent Bola Tinubu will once again be fragmented.

title: Streeting Favors National Insurance Cut, More North Sea Drilling
title_cn: Streeting有利于国家保险削减和更多北海钻探
summary: UK leadership challenger Wes Streeting backed new North Sea drilling for oil and gas, while also floating the idea of cutting employers’ national insurance in the latest move to distinguish himself from policies pursued by Keir Starmer’s government.
